ddls:
CREATE TABLE "scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the testing scenario */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the testing scenario */,
  "actif" TEXT /* Flag to indicate if the scenario is active (0 = inactive, 1 = active) */,
  "test_validated" TEXT /* Flag to indicate if the tests for the scenario have been validated (0 = not validated, 1 = validated) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the testing scenario (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the scenario */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the scenario was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the scenario */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the scenario was last modified */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the scenario belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenarios_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenarios_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenarios_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the testing scenario the test case belongs to */,
  "test_case_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the test case */,
  "expected_result" TEXT /* Expected result of the test case */,
  "actual_result" TEXT /* Actual result of the test case */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test case (e.g., passed, failed, in progress) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the test case (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test case */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the test case */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was last modified */,
  "test_case_type" TEXT /* Type of the test case (e.g., functional, performance, security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_runs" (
  "test_run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test run */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case the test run belongs to */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date when the test run was executed */,
  "run_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who executed the test run */,
  "run_result" TEXT /* Result of the test run (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the test run */,
  "test_case_version" TEXT /* Version of the test case being run */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test was run (e.g., development, staging, production) */,
  "test_case_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test run in seconds */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test run */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the test run was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, project manager) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the user account */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenario_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the testing scenario that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Details of the change made */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the log entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_logs_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_logs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Details of the change made */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the log entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_logs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_logs_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the project */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was last modified */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" TEXT /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_scenarios" (
  "project_scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-scenario mapping */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the testing scenario */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project-scenario mapping */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the project-scenario mapping was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_scenarios_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_scenarios_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_scenarios_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id")
)
